children.name: .hero-title
children.characters: Your Claude Design exports, editable in Figma.

children.name: .hero-sub
children.characters: Real frames, real auto-layout, real components — not a screenshot.

children.name: .section-title
children.characters: Claude Design exports to Canva, PDF, PPTX, and HTML — but not Figma.

children.name: Design teams live in Figma. The
children.characters: Design teams live in Figma. The obvious workaround is to screenshot the HTML and paste the PNG — but that produces a dead artifact. No editable text, no swappable components, no design system carry-over.

children.name: The moment a designer wants to i
children.characters: The moment a designer wants to iterate, they rebuild the entire thing by hand. Every spacing decision, every token, every component boundary — re-derived from a flat image.

children.name: .section-title
children.characters: Three steps. One command in the middle.

children.name: Standard HTML export. No special
children.characters: Standard HTML export. No special setup, no plugin, no flags. Whatever you'd download today.

children.name: One command. Resolves CSS, compu
children.characters: One command. Resolves CSS, computes layout with yoga, detects components, extracts design tokens.

children.name: Builds a real scene graph: frame
children.characters: Builds a real scene graph: frames, auto-layout, components with text overrides, paint and text styles in your local styles panel.

children.name: .section-title
children.characters: Four things you get that a screenshot never gives you.

children.name: Every <div> becomes a FrameNode.
children.characters: Every <div> becomes a FrameNode. Change the text — it stays text.

children.name: display:flex; gap:16px; justify-
children.characters: display:flex; gap:16px; justify-content:space-between becomes a horizontal auto-layout frame.

children.name: ↳ drop a child in — Figma lays i
children.characters: ↳ drop a child in — Figma lays it out.

children.name: Six identical card markups becom
children.characters: Six identical card markups become one Card component plus six instances. Edit the master, all six update.

children.name: Repeated colors become color/pri
children.characters: Repeated colors become color/primary. Repeated text combos become heading/lg, body/md.

children.name: .section-title
children.characters: An IR sits in the middle. Both halves are dumb.

children.name: .pipe-caption
children.characters: "Both halves are dumb. The IR is the product. Swap the plugin for a Sketch or Penpot builder later — only that half changes."

children.name: Open source. MIT licensed. The p
children.characters: Open source. MIT licensed. The plugin install lives inside the repo's /figma folder.

children.name: .cmd
children.characters: cd claude-to-figma && pnpm install && pnpm -r build
